scripts.serve: npm run build && export JAVA_HOME='/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home'; export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,auth
scripts.test:emulators: npm run build && export JAVA_HOME='/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home'; export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; firebase emulators:exec --project demo-boatface --config ../firebase.json --only auth,firestore,functions "node --test test/emulator.integration.test.mjs"
